title: Limit switch case clause length
description: Switch cases with too many statements reduce the readability of control flow and make the code harder to understand. Long case clauses should be extracted into dedicated functions to improve maintainability.
recommendation: Extract long case clause content into dedicated methods or functions.

noncompliant.description: Long switch cases with many statements make the code harder to read and understand. Each case should be concise.

compliant.description: Extracting long case logic into dedicated functions makes the switch statement more readable and the code more maintainable.

checks.message: Switch case clauses should not exceed 15 lines for better readability.
